summary: Fix login button not submitting on mobile Safari
description:
## Objective

- Login button fails to submit on iOS Safari 17
- Blocks all mobile Safari users from logging in
- Affects iPhone 14 and newer (100% repro rate)

## Details

### Current Behavior

- Tapping the login button on iPhone 14 Safari 17 does nothing
- No console error; form submit event is not fired
- Affects only Safari — Chrome Mobile works correctly

### Expected Behavior

- Login button submits the form and navigates to dashboard
- Works consistently across all supported mobile browsers

### Reproduction Steps

1. Open the app on iPhone 14 Safari 17
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Tap the login button
4. Observe: nothing happens

### Environment

- **Environment:** production
- **Affected version / release:** v2.4.1
- **Affected accounts / tenants:** all
- **Frequency:** always

### Supporting Evidence

- Sentry issue: https://example.sentry.io/issues/123

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Login button submits the form on iPhone 14 Safari 17
- [ ] No regression on Chrome Mobile or desktop browsers
- [ ] Automated test added for mobile Safari form submission

## How to Test

1. **Prerequisites:** iPhone 14 or Safari 17 simulator
2. **Reproduction:** Open app, enter credentials, tap login; confirm no submit
3. **Verification:** After fix, tap login; confirm navigation to dashboard
4. **Regression check:**
   - Chrome Mobile login still works
   - Desktop Safari login still works

## Release Notes

Fixed an issue where the login button did not submit on iOS Safari 17.
